title: Circuit Complexity: Gate Count and Circuit Depth
description: Master the fundamental measures of quantum circuit complexity including gate count, circuit depth, and their relationships to computational resources.
learningObjectives: Define and distinguish between gate complexity and circuit depth
Understand the role of gate sets in complexity measures
Analyze the depth-width tradeoff in quantum circuits
Prove lower bounds on circuit complexity for specific problems
Connect circuit complexity to computational resources
Apply complexity measures to evaluate quantum algorithms
